lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: We did it! Tempoross has been sudbued once again. Well done!

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Take a well deserved rest but don't get too comfy, it'll regain its energy soon enough!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What should I do now?

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: We usually find some debris washed up near the docks back at Unkah. Feel free t' have a look. Ya might find somethin' useful!

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: It won't be long before Tempoross regains enough energy to be a problem and we'll have to wrangle it again. Hopefully we can count on you to 'elp!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm ready to leave.

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Aye aye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: What do you need, adventurer? There is a battle to fight!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I help?

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Get yerself a harpoon from the crate on the ship, then go fish around the island t' catch some harpoonfish. They make fer fine ammo against Tempoross!

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Once ye caught some, ye can cook 'em at the shrines on the island if ye want 'em to pack more of a punch. Then come back t' the ship an' load 'em in the ammunition crates next to the cannons.

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Our cannoneers will get t' firin' the harpoonfish at Tempoross. When it's weak an' submerges to recover its energy, get down to the jetty next t' the ship an' fish those spirit pools.

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Be quick with fishin' those spirit pools though, or it'll come back so strong we'll have to abandon the fight! With any luck, we'll weaken those spirit fish enough t' subdue Tempoross. Now get t' the fight, sailor!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aye aye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What should I watch out for?

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: If Tempoross electrocutes a cannon t' stop it from firin', ya better load your harpoonfish into the other ammunition crates t' keep them cannons firin' instead.

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Also, make sure t' grab a rope from the ship crates an' keep an eye out for big waves. We'll make sure t' shout about them. Then ye best quickly tether yerself t' an island totem pole or ship mast with that rope.

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: If the waves break the totem pole or ship mast, ye can grab a hammer from the ship crates t' fix 'em up before the next big wave hits.

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Oh, an' keep an eye out for lightnin' clouds causin' fires. Get a bucket from the ship crates, fill it with water at a pump, and get t' puttin it out before it spreads.

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: If ye get hit by the waves or fire, don't be surprised when ye lose those fish an' tools ye gathered. Now get t' the fight, sailor!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aye aye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to leave.

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Really? You will receive no reward if you do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll get on with the fighting.

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Tempoross will surface soon, prepare yourselves!

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: More fish!

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Load those cannons!

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Keep an eye on the waves!

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Tempoross is drawing in water, prepare yourselves!

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: The totem pole has been damaged!

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Storm clouds are rolling in, get your buckets ready!

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Tempoross has submerged, fish from the whirlpools!

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Tempoross has surfaced, keep those cannons firing!

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Tempoross has retreated to the depths!

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: Tempoross has gathered too much energy!

lines.speaker: First Mate Peri
lines.text: The storm has grown too strong, we must retreat!
